preamble.summary: Hananiah the false prophet. MT ch. 28 = LXX ch. 35. LXX slightly shorter.
preamble.notable_variants: LXX omits some of the narrative detail. Names differ slightly in Greek form.

variant_notes: Substantially identical between MT and LXX, with minor differences.
